seo.title: AI Agent Testing Strategies in Google ADK Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix ai agent testing strategies in Google ADK agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: AI Agent Testing Strategies in Google ADK reveal critical reliability gaps in multi-agent systems, particularly around delegation loops, model inconsistencies, state corruption, and tool mismatches. These issues manifest uniquely through ADK's agent orchestration patterns and Gemini model integrations, causing unpredictable failures in production deployments. Comprehensive testing strategies are essential to ensure robust agent collaboration and consistent performance across complex workflows.

howItManifests.symptom: Agent A delegates to Agent B, which delegates back to Agent A, causing infinite loops in `run_agent()` execution
howItManifests.impact: System hangs indefinitely, exhausting compute resources and failing user requests

howItManifests.scenario: Gemini model switching causing output inconsistency
howItManifests.symptom: Agents configured with different Gemini models (gemini-1.5-pro vs gemini-1.5-flash) produce incompatible response formats
howItManifests.impact: Downstream agents fail to parse responses, breaking workflow execution

howItManifests.scenario: Session state corruption in long conversations
howItManifests.symptom: ADK session state (`agent_session.state`) gets corrupted after 10+ turns due to improper state merging in multi-agent handoffs
howItManifests.impact: Agents lose conversation context, generating irrelevant or hallucinated responses

howItManifests.scenario: Tool response format mismatches across agents
howItManifests.symptom: One agent returns tool response as dict, another as string, violating ADK's `ToolResponse` schema expectations
howItManifests.impact: Tool execution chain breaks with `ValidationError: Expected ToolResponse, got str`

detection.name: Circular Delegation Detector
detection.description: Monitors agent delegation graph to detect cycles using DFS traversal of ADK's execution history

detection.name: Model Consistency Checker
detection.description: Validates all agents in workflow use identical Gemini model configurations

detection.name: Session State Integrity Monitor
detection.description: Tracks session state mutations across agent handoffs to detect corruption

fixes.name: Delegation Circuit Breaker
fixes.description: Prevents circular delegation with delegation depth limits in ADK callbacks
fixes.code:
from google.adk import before_agent_callback

@before_agent_callback
def prevent_circular_delegation(ctx, agent, **kwargs):
    session = ctx.session
    delegation_path = getattr(session, '_delegation_path', [])
    
    if agent.name in delegation_path[-3:]:  # Last 3 agents
        raise ValueError(f"Circular delegation detected: {delegation_path + [agent.name]}")
    
    delegation_path.append(agent.name)
    session._delegation_path = delegation_path[:10]  # Limit path length
    return ctx

fixes.name: Unified Model Configuration
fixes.description: Enforces consistent Gemini model across all ADK agents in workflow
fixes.code:
from google.adk import Agent, Workflow
from google.generativeai.types import HarmCategory, HarmBlockThreshold

def create_consistent_workflow():
    MODEL_CONFIG = {
        'model': 'gemini-1.5-pro',
        'temperature': 0.7,
        'top_p': 0.9
    }
    
    researcher = Agent(
        name="researcher",
        model_name=MODEL_CONFIG['model'],
        temperature=MODEL_CONFIG['temperature'],
        top_p=MODEL_CONFIG['top_p']
    )
    
    writer = Agent(
        name="writer",
        model_name=MODEL_CONFIG['model'],
        temperature=MODEL_CONFIG['temperature'],
        top_p=MODEL_CONFIG['top_p']
    )
    
    workflow = Workflow(agents=[researcher, writer])
    return workflow

fixes.name: State Pruning Middleware
fixes.description: Periodically prunes session state in long ADK conversations
fixes.code:
from google.adk import after_agent_callback

@after_agent_callback
def prune_session_state(ctx, agent, response, **kwargs):
    session = ctx.session
    if len(session.turn_history) % 10 == 0:  # Every 10 turns
        # Keep only relevant context
        relevant_history = session.turn_history[-20:]  # Last 20 turns
        session.turn_history = relevant_history
        
        # Clear temporary state
        if hasattr(session.state, 'temp'):
            del session.state.temp
    return response

vexAutomation.heading: Automating AI Agent Testing Strategies Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates seamlessly with Google ADK through `before_agent_callback`, automatically detecting all four failure modes in real-time during agent execution. It captures delegation graphs, model configurations, session state mutations, and tool response schemas without modifying core agent logic. Vex provides comprehensive observability dashboards showing failure rates, MTTR metrics, and automated remediation suggestions specific to ADK patterns.

The platform runs parallel canary deployments to validate fixes before production rollout and maintains golden signal SLOs for agent reliability. Vex's ADK-specific test suites cover 95% of common failure scenarios, reducing manual testing overhead by 80%. Integration takes <5 minutes with the vex-sdk pip package.
vexAutomation.code:
import vex
from google.adk import before_agent_callback

# Install: pip install google-adk vex-sdk

@vex.monitor(test_id="adk-agent-reliability")
@before_agent_callback
def vex_adk_monitor(ctx, agent, **kwargs):
    # Vex auto-detects all 4 failure modes
    metrics = {
        'delegation_depth': len(getattr(ctx.session, '_delegation_path', [])),
        'model_consistency': agent.model.name,
        'state_size': len(str(ctx.session.state)),
        'tool_schema_valid': True
    }
    
    vex.record_metrics(metrics)
    vex.check_critical(
        metrics['delegation_depth'] < 5,
        'CIRCULAR_DELEGATION_RISK'
    )
    vex.check_critical(
        metrics['state_size'] < 50000,
        'STATE_CORRUPTION'
    )
    
    return ctx

# Vex auto-generates test suite and dashboards
